title: thepanther1's resource pack
description: thepanther1's resource pack is a pvp resource pack for thepanther1 fans
body:
**thepanther1 Resource Pack**

A lightweight PvP-focused resource pack designed for modern Minecraft versions, improving combat visibility and enhancing selected items and entities while staying close to vanilla style.

**Overview**

This resource pack enhances specific in-game visuals to improve clarity during combat and general gameplay. It maintains a clean aesthetic while making important items and entities easier to see and distinguish.

The pack is designed for Minecraft 1.16 through 1.21.11.
**
Features
**
Custom item models and textures

Improved projectile visibility

Enhanced shield visuals

Updated trident and arrow textures

Clean, minimal changes that preserve vanilla feel

No gameplay modifications — purely visual

**Compatibility**

Minecraft Java Edition

Compatible with 1.16 – 1.21.11

Works with Fabric, Forge, and vanilla clients

No OptiFine required

**Installation**

Download the ZIP file.

Place it into your .minecraft/resourcepacks folder.

Enable it in the in-game Resource Packs menu.
